zh.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel是Roger Iv Tosny Toeni的女兒，於1192年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭。她於1220年之前與John Porter在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1243年之後在英國英格蘭賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel是Roger Iv Tosny Toeni的女儿，于1192年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭。她于1220年之前与John Porter在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1243年之后在英国英格兰賀特福爾福拉姆斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Paynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

en.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel was born in 1192, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Roger Iv Tosny Toeni. She married John Porter before 1220, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1243, in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel est née en 1192, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Roger Iv Tosny Toeni. Elle a épousé John Porter avant 1220, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1243, à Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel wurde 1192 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Roger Iv Tosny Toeni geboren. Sie hat vor 1220 in England John Porter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1243 in Flamstead, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel è nata il nel 1192 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Roger Iv Tosny Toeni. Lei sposato John Porter prima del 1220, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1243, nel Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynelは1192年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでRoger Iv Tosny Toeniの娘として生まれた。1220年以前にイギリスでJohn Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1243年以後にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアフラムステアドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel(은)는 1192년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Roger Iv Tosny Toeni의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1220년 이전 영국에서 John Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1243년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 플램스테아드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel nasceu em 1192, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Roger Iv Tosny Toeni. Ela casou-se com John Porter antes 1220, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1243, em Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel родилась в 1192 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Roger Iv Tosny Toeni. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Porter перед 1220 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1243 г. в местности флэмстид, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Godeheut Paynel nació en 1192, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Roger Iv Tosny Toeni. Se casó con John Porter antes de 1220, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1243, en Flamstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
